song.title: Living For Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Living for Jesus a life that is true, Striving to please Him in all that I do; Yielding allegiance, glad-hearted and free, This is the pathway of blessing for me.
[C] Chorus O Jesus, Lord and Savior, I give myself to Thee, For Thou, in Thy redemption, Didst give Thyself for me;|| I own no other Master, My heart shall be Thy throne, My life I give, henceforth to live, O Christ, for Thee alone.
[V2] 2) Living for Jesus who died in my place, Bearing on Calv’ry my sin and disgrace; Such love constrains me to answer His call, Follow His leading and give Him my all.
[V3] 3) Living for Jesus wherever I am, Doing each duty in His holy name; Willing to suffer affliction and loss, Deeming each trial a part of my cross.
[V4] 4) Living for Jesus Through earth’s little while, My dearest treasure, The light of His smile; Seeking the lost ones He died to redeem, Bringing the weary to find rest in Him.
song.author: Thomas O. Chisholm
